title: Tirucalia cameronii
taxonomy: Tirucalia cameronii is classified under the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and morphological features. Within the Apocynaceae family, Tirucalia cameronii is further classified under the subfamily Rauvolfioideae. The plant's classification is closely related to other species within the same family, such as the genus Rauvolfia. Further research and analysis are required to confirm the exact classification of Tirucalia cameronii.
